nl_query: Show all annotations created by Dr. Anand Rao.
failed_sql:
SELECT ea_ann.id AS annotation_id, ea_ann.annotation_type, ea_ann.payload, ea_ann.created_at, au.display_name AS created_by_name
FROM   evaluation_annotation ea_ann
JOIN   evaluation_attempt    ea ON ea.id = ea_ann.attempt_id
JOIN   app_user              au ON au.id = ea.created_by
WHERE  au.name = 'Dr. Anand Rao';
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): evaluation_attempt.created_by. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
